title: Prompt: Complication
description: Generates a twist or obstacle that raises the stakes of a story.
entries: but the only witness refuses to speak
and the deadline was yesterday
but no one else can see the thing that changed
and the person who could explain it just disappeared
but telling the truth would cost someone their life
and the map they trusted was drawn to deceive
but the door only opens from the other side
and the more they help, the worse it gets
but the reward is exactly what they were trying to escape
and the one ally they have is lying about something big
but every hour they wait, the price doubles
and the rescuer turns out to need rescuing first
but the enemy is someone they have already forgiven once
and the evidence keeps rewriting itself overnight
but saving one means abandoning the other
and the town has quietly decided to protect the wrong person
but they have done this exact thing before and have no memory of it
and the clock they are racing is the one thing they cannot trust
but the person they are looking for does not want to be found
and admitting the mistake means unraveling everything built on it
but the cure works only if they never speak of it
and the crowd has already decided how the story ends
but the letter was meant for someone else entirely
and the only road out passes back through the thing they fled
but they are the last person anyone would believe
and the promise binding them was made in someone else's name
but the truth would spare a stranger and doom a friend
and every version of the plan requires trusting a liar
but the door they need locked is one they left open
and the child sees exactly what the adults refuse to
but success means they can never go home again
and the thing chasing them is only doing what they asked it to
but the winning move was crossed out of the rules last night
and the person keeping the secret is trying to protect them from it
but they have already spent the one favor this requires
and the further in they go, the less certain they are it is real
but the confession would free them and cage someone they love
and the deadline is real, but the reward was never going to be
but the only key was buried with the one who hid it
and by the time they understand the rules, they have already broken the worst one
